sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9103" key="a)ni/yalos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνίψᾰλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἴπτομαι</etym>) <sense id="n9103.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unhurt,</tr_> Stes.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">76</biblScope> </bibl> (<xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀνίψανον</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
